imprimir.title: Print QR
imprimir.subtitle: Customize and download your print-ready QR code
imprimir.note: 💡 For best results, print on photo paper or card stock. Make sure the QR has good contrast with the background.

medica.title: Emergency Medical ID
medica.desc: Your personal QR contains all the critical information first responders need during the Golden Minute — the decisive time after an accident where having immediate medical data can save a life.
medica.step1_desc: Complete your blood type, allergies, chronic conditions and emergency contacts in your VitaLink account.
medica.step2_desc: Your QR code with a 32-character cryptographic token is generated automatically. Download and print it.
medica.step3_desc: In your wallet, helmet, watch strap, backpack or PVC card. Any smartphone can read it without installing apps.
medica.step4_desc: In 3 seconds they see: blood type, allergies, medications, conditions and emergency contacts. No login, no waiting.
medica.scenario2: Fainting during a marathon or extreme sport
medica.scenario3: Severe allergic reaction in a public place
medica.scenario4: Elderly person with Alzheimer's away from home
medica.benefit1: Unique, non-repeatable token — your privacy is protected
medica.benefit2: Works without responder internet connection (loads in seconds)
medica.benefit3: Data updatable in real time from your profile
medica.benefit4: Automatically notifies your contacts when scanned
medica.cta: Go to my profile and set up →

objetos.title: Lost Items
objetos.desc: Stick a VitaLink QR sticker on your valuables. Whoever finds them can contact you instantly — without seeing your personal data directly. You receive a notification with the approximate location.
objetos.step1_desc: Give it a name, description and photo. VitaLink generates a unique QR for that specific item.
objetos.step2_desc: Water-resistant stickers for keys, laptops, backpacks, umbrellas, musical instruments and more.
objetos.step3_desc: They scan the QR → see a page with your message ('If you found this…') and a button 'I found this item'.
objetos.step4_desc: Immediate notification with the time and location of the scan. You arrange the return safely and anonymously.
objetos.benefit1: Total anonymity — the finder doesn't see your name or phone
objetos.benefit4: Waterproof stickers available in physical kit
objetos.cta: Got it — notify me when available

mascotas.title: Pets
mascotas.desc: If your dog or cat escapes, the QR on their collar is the fastest way for whoever finds them to contact you — including critical veterinary information in case the pet needs urgent care.
mascotas.step1_desc: Name, photo, breed, age, medical conditions, medications and vet's name.
mascotas.step2_desc: Stainless steel tag engraved with all-weather QR. It won't fade or peel.
mascotas.step3_desc: They see the pet's name, your emergency contact and any special medical conditions.
mascotas.step4_desc: You receive the alert and arrange the handover location. Pet comes home safe and sound.
mascotas.scenario1: Dogs that escape during walks or fireworks
mascotas.scenario3: Pet found unconscious — immediate vet data
mascotas.scenario4: Pets travelling or with temporary carers
mascotas.benefit1: Multilingual support — works even if found by tourists
mascotas.benefit2: Veterinary info visible in case of medical emergency
mascotas.benefit3: Pet photo on public page to confirm identity
mascotas.benefit4: Immediate notification when collar QR is scanned
mascotas.cta: Got it — notify me when available

equipaje.title: Luggage & Travel
equipaje.desc: Lost luggage at the airport? Backpack left on a bus? The QR on your luggage lets any person or airline contact you immediately — with your destination, hotel and travel insurance details.
equipaje.step1_desc: Destination, dates, hotel, flight number, travel insurance and emergency contact in the destination country.
equipaje.step2_desc: Hanging tag with QR + barcode for your suitcases, carry-on and travel bag.
equipaje.step3_desc: They see your contact details, flight, hotel and preferred language. All without exposing your passport.
equipaje.step4_desc: Direct and tracked coordination. History of where and when your bag was scanned.
equipaje.scenario1: Lost luggage by airline at a connection
equipaje.scenario2: Backpack left on public transport or tour bus
equipaje.scenario3: Luggage left at hotel or waiting room
equipaje.scenario4: International travel — info in local language
equipaje.benefit2: You don't expose your home address or passport to the public
equipaje.benefit3: Includes travel insurance number for fast claims
equipaje.benefit4: Scan history with location to track luggage route
equipaje.cta: Got it — notify me when available

activos.title: Corporate Assets
activos.desc: Manage the safety of your staff and control of corporate assets with VitaLink QR. Ideal for mining, construction, logistics and any company where workplace safety is critical.
activos.step1_desc: Each worker has their QR ID with emergency medical data and safety protocols for their role.
activos.step2_desc: Laptops, vehicles, machinery, helmets and tools have QR for instant identification of the responsible person.
activos.step3_title: Accident at a site or mine
activos.step3_desc: Emergency doctor scans the worker's helmet → sees blood type, allergies, family contact and health insurance.
activos.step4_desc: If a corporate device turns up elsewhere, whoever finds it can report it directly to the company.
activos.scenario2: Construction site — emergency protocol on helmet
activos.scenario3: Vehicle fleet — asset and driver control
activos.scenario4: Corporate IT equipment — recovery after loss
activos.benefits_title: How does it benefit your company?
activos.benefit2: Centralized dashboard of all active company QR codes
activos.benefit3: API for integration with existing ERP and HR systems
activos.benefit4: B2B volume licenses — reduced cost per employee
activos.cta: Got it — notify me when available
